rulings.Case Title: VICTORIA L PETERSON VS. LUIS ADAME et al
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, June 4, 2010, line 1, DEFENDANT LUIS ADAME MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT. Is continued to 6/18/2010, opposing party to provide courtesy copy of opposition with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. =(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: DOMUS & DOMUS, FORMERLY DOMUS DESIGN GROUP, A VS. SWINERTON BUILDERS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Amended Petition For Confirmation Of Arbitration
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, June 4, 2010, line 5, PETITIONER DOMUS & DOMUS, FORMERLY DOMUS DESIGN GROUP, Amended Petition for Confirmation of Arbitration Award. Is granted, including prejudgment interest calculated from March 5th award to May 19th, and interest on attorney fees, plus additional requested attorney fees and costs. See Britz, Inc. vs. Alfa-Laval Food & Diary Co. (1995) 34 Cal.App. 4th 1085, 1106-1107; CCP section 1293.2.)=(302/CWW)

rulings.Case Title: DEUTSCHE BANK NATIONAL TRUST COMPANY, AS TRUSTEE VS. WILLIAM BAILES et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice And Motion For Forfeiture Under Ccp 1179
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, June 4, 2010, line 7, DEFENDANT WILLIAM BAILES Motion for Relief from Forfeiture Under CCP section 1179. Granted. No opposition filed. =(302/CWW)
